Perfect! The implementation looks good. Let me create a summary of the changes I made:

## Summary of Changes

I've successfully updated the game complete state to follow the Figma design by removing the popup modal and implementing an inline game complete state. Here are the key changes:

### 1. **JavaScript Changes (`script.js`)**:
- **Removed popup modal**: Updated `endGame()` method to call `showGameCompleteState()` instead of showing a Bootstrap modal
- **Added inline game complete state**: Created `showGameCompleteState()` method that updates the text section with:
  - Title: "You and energy savings are a perfect match!"
  - Subtitle: "Thanks for playing our game. To learn more about energy efficiency, visit us at SaveWithPPL.com."
  - "Start Over" button that calls `game.resetGame()`
- **Removed modal event listener**: Cleaned up `setupEventListeners()` method
- **Maintained reset functionality**: The `resetGame()` method properly restores the original game text

### 2. **CSS Changes (`styles.css`)**:
- **Removed modal styles**: Deleted all modal-related CSS (`.modal-content`, `.modal-header`, etc.)
- **Updated button styling**: Changed the "Start Over" button to use:
  - Background: `var(--ppl-yellow)` (yellow)
  - Text color: `var(--ppl-blue)` (blue)
  - Proper hover effects and transitions

### 3. **HTML Changes (`index.html`)**:
- **Removed modal HTML**: Deleted the entire game over modal structure
- **Removed Bootstrap Icons**: Removed the Bootstrap Icons CSS link since we're not using stars anymore

### 4. **Game Complete State Features**:
- ✅ **No popup**: Game complete state appears inline in the text section
- ✅ **Correct title**: "You and energy savings are a perfect match!"
- ✅ **Correct subtitle**: "Thanks for playing our game. To learn more about energy efficiency, visit us at SaveWithPPL.com."
- ✅ **"Start Over" button**: Yellow button with blue text that resets the game
- ✅ **"Found 6/6" badge**: Shows completion status
- ✅ **All cards remain visible**: Cards stay flipped and matched when game is complete

The game now follows the Figma design exactly - when all 6 pairs are matched, the game shows the complete state inline without any popup, with the correct title, subtitle, and a "Start Over" button that allows players to restart the game.
